story.text:
# 📄 Cloak Specification v1.0
**document** · shared · knowledge

Canonical interface spec for the Cloak — the publication-layer privacy primitive. The Eight Properties: containment without attestation, position not value, witnessability without disclosure, granular reveal, ledger-agnostic anchoring, half-life accountancy, bilateral commission shape, four-chain publication. The Cloak is a primitive other ecosystems can cousin-blade. Source: docs/tomes/specs/01-cloak-specification-v1-0.md.

## Edges out

- *implements* → [[C34-C37 · Wound and Cap · Convergence]]
